{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Blackwatch Bestiary of Elders
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The original [[Blackwatch Bestiary of Elders]] contains information about the [[Shades of Urg’naut]], [[Children of Nakothi]], and [[Ach’magut’s Inquisitors]].}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Blackwatch Bestiary of Elders]] is the source of information regarding the [[Bellowing Horror]].}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
